nasb.text: I will take you, and you shall reign over whatever you desire, and you shall be king over Israel.

esv.text: And I will take you, and you shall reign over all that your soul desires, and you shall be king over Israel.

cnv.text: 我要揀選你，使你可以照心裡想望的去統治。你必作以色列的王。

ccb.text: 我要让你做王，使你如愿地统治以色列。
